uplink.description: Periodic frame: full 3-in-1 reading — temperature 22.5 C, humidity 48.3 %RH, CO2 650 ppm
uplink._note: expected derived by running the upstream TTN decoder (reference/upstream-codec.js, 0xAA periodic frame): temp 22.5 C, humidity 48.3 %RH, co2 650 ppm. RISE has only co2/temp/humidity sensors so the shared frame's VOC/lux/noise/occupancy fields are left zero and not decoded.

uplink.description: Periodic frame: sub-zero temperature -10 C, humidity 65 %RH, CO2 412 ppm
uplink._note: expected derived by running the upstream TTN decoder (0xAA periodic frame): temp -10 C, humidity 65 %RH, co2 412 ppm

uplink.description: Periodic frame: CO2 error sentinel (16383) and temperature deactivated sentinel (1021) suppressed; humidity 55 %RH retained
uplink._note: expected derived by running the upstream TTN decoder: temp code 1021 -> 'Desactivated sensor', co2 code 16383 -> 'Error'; both suppressed per the sensor-absent codes, humidity 55 %RH retained

uplink.description: Wrong product byte (0xAB = Move, not RISE) returns an error
uplink._note: the shared upstream decoder happily decodes 0xAB as 'Move LoRa' (no product gating), but this is the RISE codec so the non-0xAA product byte is rejected
